raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A white microwave oven is on a wooden table. The microwave has a door with a handle on the right side. The door is closed. STRATEGY - First, reach for the microwave door handle. Then, grasp the handle to open the door. The door is hinged on the left, so pulling the handle will swing the door open to the right. Failure modes include not grasping the handle properly or pulling in the wrong direction. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the microwave door body; Step 2 grasp the right handle for opening; Step 3 pull the handle to the right to open the door.**
Goal: open(microwave_door)
Scene: microwave, table
Step 1: reach(microwave)
  affordance_region: the body of the white microwave
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, microwave, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, microwave) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(microwave)
  affordance_region: the right handle of the microwave door
  contact: holding(microwave) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(microwave)
Step 3: pull(microwave -> right)
  affordance_region: the right handle of the microwave door
  contact: holding(microwave) [progress]
  spatial: distance(microwave_door, table, >, 0.1) [completion]
  direction: pull_axis(1, 0, 0) [completion]
  safety: no_collision(microwave_door, table)
  done_when: distance(microwave_door, table) > 0.1
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the white microwave
the right handle of the microwave door
the right handle of the microwave door
